title: Reverscore
description: Reverscore is a mod for the Revers Modpacks which adds various items and bosses.
body:
Reverscore is a mod which adds items, armors sets, tools, boss fights and other assets for the Revers: Reverse Collapse and Revers: Continuum Turbulence modpacks.

It will not work properly outside of it.

Nearly everything in Reverscore has no recipe of its own since the items are supposed to be obtained by using other mods, in a modpack.

Reverscore currently adds seven armor sets, four items that grant various buffs while in the inventory or offhand, several bosses and miscellaneous items.

**Armor Effects**
Deluge: Absorption IV, Luck, Speed, Strength, Haste, Fire Resistance, Saturation II
Archaeologist: Absorption III, Resistance II, Regeneration II, Saturation, Weakness, Slowness II
Soleipse: Speed, Strength III, Fire Resistance II
Lunepse: Speed III, Strength I, Haste II

**Pocket Items Effects**
Pocket Elisa: +100 Damage, Speed II and Resistance II
Double Tap Root Beer: +20 Damage
Ashes of Divine Winter: Permanent Fire Aspect and inflicting Slowness
Wheel-Dice of Fate: Grants random effects when hurting mobs
Ars Automatica: Grants various items when killing mobs with potion effects.

**Bosses**
Avar - an evil manifestation of greed, will summon his mercenaries against you and run away.
Kintoru - an evil manifestation of control who has mimicked a small ghast, will summon her puppets and accursed minions against you.
Netamo - an evil manifestation of rage who has mimicked a giant wolf, will rush towards you and fight you.
Gorge - an evil manifestation of gluttony. He will lifesteal off your damage.
Enzukai - an evil manifestation of jealousy who has mimicked an enderman, will fight you and steal your damage inflicted to him.
Hybrice - an evil manifestation of pride. Hybrice was too prideful to not have minions like Kintoru and so will attack you alongside an army of arthropods.
Yuma - the evil manifestation of rebirth. After defeating all previous evil, Yuma will end the world and restart everything anew. Yuma is the strongest boss of Reverscore and is almost impossible to defeat in Vanilla Minecraft circumstances.


**Continuum Turbulence Exclusive**
Ice Armor Set and Tools: A very frail but powerful early game option. Grants regeneration 1.
Ice Pick: A pickaxe specially made to mine ice.
Frozen Ice Armor Set and Tools: An upgraded expensive version of the Ice Set. Grants various effects.
Godly Stick: A stick which grants various buffs upon the player.


A small thanks to Superwibr for helping out for the bosses and textures.

Wiki: https://revers.fandom.com/wiki/Revers_Wiki
 
Revers: Reverse Collapse: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/revers-reverse-collapse

Revers: Continuum Turbulence: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/revers-continuum-turbulence

Revers: Reverse Collapse (Technic): https://www.technicpack.net/modpack/revers-reverse-collapse

Revers: Continuum Turbulence (Technic): https://www.technicpack.net/modpack/revers-continuum-turbulence
